* Associate an issue with the Pull Request: `Fixes #123`.
* Ensure the code is up-to-date with the `main` branch.
* Include a description of the proposed changes and how to test them.
* If this touches Rust code, run `cargo test -p cod-native` before opening.
* If this touches TypeScript, run `npm run build-fast` to verify compilation.
